https://doi.org/10.1177/2165079915591708

https://doi.org/10.1111/jonm.12042
PubMed

https://doi.org/10.1016/j.outlook.2015.11.008
PubMed

https://doi.org/10.3109/01612840903308531
PubMed

https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1466-7657.2010.00815.x

https://doi.org/10.1111/jnu.12167
PubMed

https://doi.org/10.1111/jan.12694
PubMed

https://doi.org/10.1097/01.NAJ.0000480497.63846.d0
PubMed

https://doi.org/10.3390/ijerph18115711
PubMed
PubMedCentral

https://doi.org/10.1080/13594329608414853

https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1365-2702.2010.03650.x

https://hbr.org/2019/05/to-become-your-best-self-study-your-successes
